requirement_topic.en: Electrical safety and low-voltage conformity for power tools
requirement_topic.zh: 电动工具电气安全与低压合规
requirement_topic.zht: 電動工具電氣安全與低壓合規

summary.en: Power tools entering UAE are commonly treated as regulated electrical products under MoIAT, with ESMA legacy pathways managed through ECAS and local importer/registrant support. Product assessments often reference UAE.S profiles aligned to GSO and IEC/EN safety practice, including 230/400 V at 50 Hz acceptance context. Unlike China's 220/380 V framing, UAE market packaging, manuals, and test expectations should reflect UAE.S-aligned voltage context. In-country registrant support is typically required to clear ECAS records and customs.
summary.zh: 进入阿联酋的电动工具通常按MoIAT监管产品处理，并通过ECAS结合ESMA历史渠道，以本地进口方或备案方支持。技术评估通常依据采用GSO并与IEC/EN衔接的UAE.S体系进行，相关供电场景以230/400V、50Hz为基础。与中国220/380V体系不同，需在标识、说明书和测试边界中反映阿联酋电源条件，且通常需本地备案/授权代表。
summary.zht: 進入阿聯酋的電動工具通常按 MoIAT 監管產品處理，並透過 ECAS 結合 ESMA 歷史渠道，以當地進口方或備案方支持。技術評估通常依據採用 GSO 並與 IEC/EN 接軌的 UAE.S 體系進行，相關供電場景以 230/400V、50Hz 為基礎。與中國 220/380V 體系不同，需在標識、說明書和測試邊界中反映阿聯酋電源條件，且通常需本地備案/授權代表。

standards_or_laws: UAE ECAS / MoIAT regulated-product conformity route for regulated electrical items
UAE.S adoption of regional Gulf and IEC/EN safety references for power appliances and tools
UAE Energy/technical conformity and mark requirements where EQM is requested

summary.en: Domestic Chinese power-tool production commonly uses CN regulatory baselines including CNCA CCC implementation categories for electric tools and GB/T 3883.1-series electrical safety requirements, with GB 4343.1-series EMC references as applicable. Chinese baseline commonly describes 220/380 V/50 Hz conditions for local use and does not itself satisfy UAE filing identity or in-country representation requirements.
summary.zh: 中国本土通常依据CNCA电动工具类CCC范围和GB/T 3883.1系列安全要求进行设计、测试和资料准备，必要时结合GB 4343.1系列EMC要求。国内基线常以220/380V、50Hz表述为主，不会自动替代UAE的ECAS备案身份或本地代表义务。
summary.zht: 中國本土通常依據 CNCA 電動工具類 CCC 範圍和 GB/T 3883.1 系列安全要求進行設計、測試和資料準備，必要時結合 GB 4343.1 系列 EMC 要求。中國基線常以 220/380V、50Hz 表述為主，不能自動替代 UAE 的 ECAS 備案身份或本地代表義務。

standards_or_laws: CNCA-C05-01 mandatory product certification framework for power tools (where applicable)

gap.en: The practical gap is not only test performance but market file adaptation, mainly local authorized representative, in-country ownership of the ECAS/EQM record, and labeling/technical documentation aligned to UAE voltage and EMC contexts. Chinese exporters should assume data relabeling and dossier remapping are needed even where electrical safety results are favorable.
gap.zh: 核心差异在于市场文件适配，不只是测试结果。主要包括本地授权代表/备案、ECAS或EQM档案在阿联酋的所有权、以及按阿联酋电压与EMC语境重写标签和技术资料。即使中国侧试验结果良好，仍常需重构合规文件。
gap.zht: 核心差異在於市場文件適配，不僅是測試結果。主要包括本地授權代表/備案、ECAS 或 EQM 檔案在阿聯酋的所有權，以及按阿聯酋電壓與 EMC 語境重寫標籤和技術資料。即使中國側測試結果良好，仍常需重構合規文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for regulated power tools in MoIAT scope; ECAS/EQM route and UAE import accountability are required before market use.
mandatory_status.cn: Conditional mandatory in China depending on category scope and CCC implementation rules; many products use CCC-oriented electrical baselines without UAE-style market filing.

source.publisher: Ministry of Industry and Advanced Technology (MoIAT)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat China safety reports as technical input only; UAE ECAS filing with UAE-side representative and MoIAT acceptance context remains the key compliance step.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 将中国侧安全报告视为技术输入而非结论。UAE ECAS备案、当地责任方信息和MoIAT受理上下文仍是市场准入关键。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 將中國側安全報告視為技術輸入而非結論。UAE ECAS 備案、當地責任方資訊與 MoIAT 受理上下文仍是市場准入關鍵。
